---
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
  pdf:
    pdf-engine: lualatex
execute:
  enabled: false
---

Число успехов в $n$ независимых испытаниях: $K\sim\mathrm{Bin}(n,p)$.

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
import numpy as np

rng = np.random.default_rng(7)
k = rng.binomial(n=20, p=0.3, size=20_000)
```

![](../../shared/figures/generated/numpy_binomial_sample.png){width=58% .nostretch}
